system.description:
### Tier 3 Standard An elite biotic warrior clad in sleek armor, capable of manipulating gravity to crush her foes. Motives & Tactics: Mobility, Control, Suppress

#### Features Biotic Lift - Action: The target must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, the target is lifted into the air and become Restrained and Vulnerable until the end of their next turn.

Warp - Action: Spend 1 Fear. The Commando hits a target with a molecular-shredding field. The target’s Thresholds are reduced by 4 until they receive a heal/cleanse, or until the scene ends. This debuff can't stack.

Blink - Reaction: When targeted by an attack, the Commando may spend 1 Stress to teleport to Close range, potentially causing the attack to miss if the new position provides full cover.

}}
